exclusion_rationale: Two seeded cases were omitted because this curation did not establish a precise primary maintenance-history relationship beyond the issue record.
limitations: Small manually curated sample from public repository history, not independent experimental ground truth.
This review does not measure precision, recall, time saved, maintainer agreement, or autonomous correctness.
Closed issues and issue text alone do not settle the bounded interpretation; ambiguous and insufficient-evidence cases remain unresolved.
